title: Mahiro Maeda joins Evangelion 30 director team
display_title: Mahiro Maeda joins Evangelion 30 director team
wikitext:
[]: Mahiro Maeda joins Evangelion 3.0 director team             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sat Jul 14, 2012 7:05 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1675.html Mahiro Maeda, director/mechanical designer of Blue Submarine No. 6, director/original character designer of Gankutsuo and all around animator/mechanical designer (Gunbuster, Honneamise, End of Evangelion etc) and prior design (image board) and animator on Evangelion 2.0 joins Kazuya Tsurumaki and Masayuki as director of Evangelion 3.0 Whole lot of cooks in this particular kitchen.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sat Jul 14, 2012 7:10 am Maeda worked on this too? It'll sure be fun when the time comes around to guess which parts of the film he had a hand in.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sat Jul 14, 2012 7:13 am EvangelionFan wrote: Maeda worked on this too? It'll sure be fun when the time comes around to guess which parts of the film he had a hand in.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sat Jul 14, 2012 11:31 am Mahiro Maeda? Two words: Holographic Clothing.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jul 14, 2012 12:04 pm Well they're all working primarily under Anno who is the head director. This makes me think there's a lot more intricate work to 3.0 that required another Key Director to oversee production. November can't come soon enough.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Jul 14, 2012 7:23 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: November can't come soon enough.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jul 14, 2012 9:02 pm I guess Anno has assigned a section for him (probably mindscrew one) similar to how Koji Morimoto was in charge of design and visual look of Sharon Apple concert in Macross Plus. He wouldn't get another "subdirector" without a good reason and doubly so since it is Maeda who is known for his visual style and flashy colours. I'm pretty sure whatever he has been assigned to do will truly stand out from the rest if Anno has given him autonomy

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sat Jul 14, 2012 10:21 pm Then maybe Maeda's the one that's working on that freaking piano!

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jul 14, 2012 10:25 pm Grand Duke of Yashima wrote: Then maybe Maeda's the one that's working on that freaking piano!

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sat Jul 14, 2012 10:28 pm Nonoriri wrote: He did also do some work on Eva 2.0 if you care to guess what that might have been!

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jul 14, 2012 10:46 pm EvangelionFan wrote: Probably the parts that weren't FLCL references, cooking, band-aids, or skimpy clothing.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sat Jul 14, 2012 11:53 pm Yeah after Anno showed them his Homura merch collection, Shinbo is now the secret 4th director for 3.0 and Butch Gen is ghost writing it. ...well I haven't heard anything like that recently, maybe I'll check around. In other Eva-related rumor talk I wonder if Hiroyuki Okiura is really involved in 3.0, that possibility more than anything is the most interesting thing for me right now at least. Oh and yeah Asari, Maeda and I think Honda were credited with the Sahaquiel design I'm pretty sure someone here posted the relevant information from the CRC. You know the production process of the films is totally weird, I'm trying to piece it all together but there are a few unusual things going on here. Firstly why was Maeda "promoted" to directorial status for 3.0 in the first place? The number of split up roles is unusual though I guess it isn't as bad as the sheer number of storyboard artists that worked on 2.0 (freaking 12) and the number of animation directors. I mean it's not like these films are really any more technical/demanding than other animated films that have released within the same time...guess I'll have to wait for the film proper/the 3.0 CRC for that.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Jul 15, 2012 12:04 am Nonoriri wrote: Yeah after Anno showed them his Homura merch collection

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sun Jul 15, 2012 12:06 am Xard wrote: That's actually beliavable, stop misleading when making jokes! Source was random poster on /a/'s Eva topic not long ago which says it all how motivated I've been to look if there's more to it and how trustworthy the source of hearsay is but it doesn't seem impossible either.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Jul 15, 2012 12:16 am Nonoriri wrote: lol it doesn't seem impossible, that much is true.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sun Jul 15, 2012 12:55 am Xard wrote: Since Anno was plenty impressed by Madoka and I've got the impression that Shinbo/SHAFT/VNc circles (type-moon, nitro+) don't really belong as clearly to Anno's immeadiate circle of friends and associates in industry as nearly any other big name (it's kinda funny how everyone knows everyone) I was intrigued by idea of Anno getting now interested in people he had overlooked/not interacted much with in the past. Sure, SHAFT/GAINAX co-operation goes way back but it's never felt like there's been close connection between Anno and them.
